home.title: STARY IKARUS
home.subtitle: THE OLD ICARUS
home.tagline: Folk-rock journeys through time and myth.

about.title: About the Band
about.section1_text:
Stary Ikarus is a musical project born from a deep desire to connect ancient myths with contemporary sound. The band plays folk-rock infused with elements of blues, jazz, and psychedelic music, creating a unique sonic space where each song is a philosophical journey.

Our music is inspired by the image of Icarus, who flew too close to the sun. But for us, this is not a story of falling, but a story of striving, seeking meaning, and transcendence.
about.section2_text:
We believe that music is a language that speaks directly to the soul. Each track contains deeply philosophical lyrics that invite the listener to contemplate life, death, love, and eternity.

Our compositions blend traditional instruments with contemporary sounds, creating a bridge between past and future.

music.title: Music
music.album1_description: Our debut album, where we present our philosophy and sound.
music.album2_description: Our second album, exploring ancient myths in the context of the modern world.
music.album3_description: Our third album, completing the trilogy about Icarus's journey.
